title: MockConfig
description: Scripted playback configuration for MockAgentRunner. Written to <projectDir>/.dex/mock-config.json. Gitignored. Mirrors the orchestrator's four phases: prerequisites, clarification, dex_loop (with explicit cycles[]), completion.

enabled.description: Master kill switch. If false while dex-config selects 'mock', startup fails with MockDisabledError.

fixtureDir.description: Base directory for `writes[].from` paths. Defaults to '<dexRepo>/fixtures/mock-run/'. Absolute paths supported; relative paths resolve against projectDir.

prerequisites.description: Stage descriptors for the prerequisites phase. Expected stage keys: prerequisites.

clarification.description: Stage descriptors for the clarification phase. Expected keys: clarification_product, clarification_technical, clarification_synthesis, constitution, manifest_extraction.

completion.description: Reserved for future post-loop stages. Empty object today.

PhaseEntry.description: Map from stage name to StepDescriptor. Unknown stage names are allowed at load time but cause MockConfigMissingEntryError (or unused entries) at run time.

delay.description: Milliseconds to sleep before producing side effects. Zero allowed. No default — author must state it.

structured_output.description: Required on stages whose real counterparts return JSON-schema-constrained output (gap_analysis, verify). Returned verbatim; no schema validation by mock.

path.description: Destination path. Relative paths resolve against projectDir; absolute paths (including those produced by goal-* tokens) are used as-is. Substitution tokens: {specDir}, {cycle}, {feature}, {goalFile}, {goalProductDomain}, {goalTechnicalDomain}, {goalClarified}. The four goal-* tokens expand to the absolute paths derived from runConfig.descriptionFile so clarification stages follow whichever goal file the user picked. Unknown tokens → MockConfigInvalidPathError.

from.description: Fixture path, relative to fixtureDir. Exactly one of from|content.

content.description: Literal content. Exactly one of from|content.

path.description: Destination, relative to projectDir. Same substitution tokens as WriteSpec.path.

line.description: Line to append. Trailing newline added if absent.
